note: Lumiere — luxury beauty GIVEAWAY (light luxe theme). Cutouts use fal BiRefNet (fal.py bg -> imgkit alpha), never colour-key. Headline + the ONE image CTA + logo via ideogram/v3. Every other button is CSS. Every prompt = brand.json.styleSignature + subjectPrompt, seed 64001. No emojis, no invented SVG; icons are generated rose-gold image assets.
